positive: A highly stylized, minimalist celestial tapestry depicting a large, powerful crescent moon emerging from stylized cosmic nebulae. The moon should have sharp, clean edges and emit a soft, internal glow of gold and pale cyan. Scattered around the moon are geometric patterns of constellations and distant stars represented by sharp, luminous points and abstract lines. The overall composition should be centered and highly contrasting: deep indigo and midnight blue for the background, contrasted by metallic silver, glowing gold, and vibrant cyan for the celestial objects. The style must be a perfect blend of modern celestial tattoo art and clean vector graphic quality, optimized for screen printing or direct-to-garment apparel art. Emphasize clean silhouettes and high contrast.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, messy, grunge, photorealistic, cartoon, messy edges
